name: rolepod
description: Coordinated software-house team for AI coding CLIs — 18 specialist agents, 44 skills, 7 rules, 5 hooks, 6-phase lifecycle. Pre-commit gates (S1-S5 simplicity / T1-T6 testing / F1-F5 failure-mode) catch bugs before ship. Installs via install.sh; not a Claude Code marketplace plugin (rolepod's CLAUDE.md + rules/ pattern doesn't map cleanly to the marketplace plugin model). See https://github.com/nuttaruj/rolepod.
